module simd_i64x2_arith2.0.wasm
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:01000000000000000100000000000000 -> v128:01000000000000000100000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:01000000000000000100000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:01000000000000000100000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:01000000000000000100000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:00000000000000800000000000000080 -> v128:00000000000000800000000000000080
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:00000000000000800000000000000080 -> v128:00000000000000800000000000000080
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:00000000000000800000000000000080 -> v128:00000000000000800000000000000080
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:00000000000000800000000000000080 -> v128:00000000000000800000000000000080
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:7b000000000000007b00000000000000 -> v128:7b000000000000007b00000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:85ffffffffffffff85ffffffffffffff -> v128:7b000000000000007b00000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:80000000000000008000000000000000 -> v128:80000000000000008000000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:80ffffffffffffff80ffffffffffffff -> v128:80000000000000008000000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:80000000000000008000000000000000 -> v128:80000000000000008000000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:80ffffffffffffff80ffffffffffffff -> v128:80000000000000008000000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs_with_const_0 () -> v128:0000000000000080ffffffffffffff7f
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:0000000000000080ffffffffffffff7f -> v128:0000000000000080ffffffffffffff7f
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_return i64x2.abs v128:00000000000000000000000000000000 -> v128:00000000000000000000000000000000
assert_invalid simd_i64x2_arith2.1.wasm
assert_invalid simd_i64x2_arith2.2.wasm
module simd_i64x2_arith2.3.wasm
assert_return i64x2.abs-i64x2.abs v128:ffffffffffffffffffffffffffffffff -> v128:01000000000000000100000000000000
